title: desmodium retroflexum
intro: Desmodium retroflexum, also known as tick clover or beggar's ticks, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desmodium retroflexum include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
